version_description: Edited version for playability. there was another version online already which is accurate but unnecessarily hard to play (at least based on UG's generated chord schemes). I've edited this version for more guitar-intuitive chords. I Personally suggest to transpose to -2 semitones and play it with capo on 2 for even better playability.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Something's got a hold of me lately[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]
No, I don't know myself anymore[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
 Feels like the walls are all closin' in[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#sus4[/ch]                 [ch]C#[/ch]
And the devil's knockin' at my door, woah[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
   Out of my mind, how many times did I tell you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
I'm no good at bein' alone?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah, it's taken a toll on me, tryin' my best to keep[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#sus4[/ch]                  [ch]C#[/ch]
From tearin' the skin off my bones, don't you know[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
   I lose control[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
When you're not next to me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#sus4[/ch]                 [ch]C#[/ch]                          [ch]F#m[/ch]
I'm fallin' apart right in front of you, can't you see?[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
I lose control[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
When you're not next to me, mhm[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#sus4[/ch]
Yeah, you're breakin' my heart, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]
You make a mess of me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
Problematic
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]
Problem is I want your body like a fiend, like a bad habit[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Bad habits hard to break when I'm with you[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]C#sus4[/ch]
Yeah, I know I can do it on my own[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C#[/ch]
But I want that real full moon black magic, but it takes two[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
   Problematic[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Problem is when I'm with you I'm an addict[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
And I need some relief, my skin in your teeth[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]C#sus4[/ch]
Can't see the forest through the trees[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C#[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Got me down on my knees, darlin', please, oh[/tab]

Yeah, you're breakin' my heart, baby[/tab]
